title: Run long-script localized UI HIG gate
summary: Ran the HIG localized UI gate for de (native-reviewed), nl, ru, sv, tr, uk under the existing review baselines. Doc-only intake: source-trace inspection of tab labels + primary actions + multisurface-harness dry-run validation (42 captures planned, idb ready). Result: fail because no screenshot evidence is preserved. Allocated 5 new major HIG findings: HIG-DE-002 (de Write 'Schreiben' 9 chars), HIG-NL-001 (nl Write 'Schrijven' 9 chars), HIG-RU-001 (ru Train 'Тренировка' 10 chars, Cyrillic), HIG-TR-001 (tr Train 'Antrenman' 9 chars), HIG-UK-001 (uk Train 'Тренування' 10 chars, Cyrillic). All adaptive-layout / open. Swedish has no source-level HIG risk. Translation-quality notes (NOT HIG defects) for ru/uk Write tab.

translation_quality_risks_noted_not_hig_: ru: 'Запись' for Write means entry/recording rather than the action
uk: 'Запис' for Write means entry/recording rather than the action
nl: 'Bewaren' for Save is correct but 'Opslaan' is the more common modern alternative
de: 'Haushalt' for Home is the household framing — native-review choice, not a defect

not_claimed: any of these 6 locales is hig-ui-reviewed
any non-German locale in this bucket is native-reviewed
translation quality for any non-German locale in this bucket
screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for any locale in this bucket
residual_risk: The 5 new findings (HIG-DE-002/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001) are source-trace inferences. Whether the tab labels actually truncate depends on iPhone width + Dynamic Type; needs screenshot confirmation.
Swedish has no recorded HIG finding only because no screenshots were captured. Live screenshots may surface additional issues.
The 5 new findings share fix shape with HIG-FR-001 from the remaining-LTR gate. A single tab-bar layout slice (not per-locale) should address all six after screenshot confirmation.
The multisurface harness needs --label-overrides for nl/ru/sv/tr/uk for the today surface; default catalog covers de only in this bucket.
downstream_recommendations: Schedule a screenshot-capture slice covering all 13 locales now in failing-bucket-gate state (fr/it/nb/pt/pt-BR/es/vi from remaining-LTR + de/nl/ru/sv/tr/uk from long-script).
If tab-truncation findings (HIG-DE-002/FR-001/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001) are confirmed by screenshot, queue a single tab-bar UI-tweak slice instead of six.
Translation-quality concerns surfaced (ru/uk Write semantics, nl Save register) belong in native-review intake slices, not in this HIG gate.
